Package io.github.lunasaw.sip.common.config

Class SipConfigurationManager

java.lang.Object
io.github.lunasaw.sip.common.config.SipConfigurationManager
@Component public class SipConfigurationManager extends Object
SIP配置管理器 统一管理SIP相关的所有配置，包括GB28181配置和验证
Author:
luna
